name: ZeroSettle
long_description: ZeroSettle helps mobile devs boost their margins by 15pp with just 15 minutes of engineering work. We quit our jobs at Apple to help developers bypass the Apple Tax by migrating loyal users to Stripe billing via targeted “Switch & Save” campaigns. Beyond billing, ZeroSettle also manages entitlement provisioning and syncing while maximizing LTV through custom cancellation flows, "saving the sale" by using intelligent discounts and subscription pauses.
one_liner: Avoid the 30% App Store Tax by Supporting Direct Billing in your App
